start.welcome:
Hi! I'm *O Tracker* — an assistant for your Oura Ring.

I'll send a daily summary of sleep, readiness and activity, and answer questions about your data.

To begin, connect your Oura account — it's secure, your password is only entered on Oura's site.

connect.prompt: Tap the button below to connect your Oura account. The link is one-time and valid for 10 minutes.
connect.already: Your Oura account is already connected ✅. To reconnect, use /connect again.
connect.success:
Done! Your Oura account is connected ✅

Now ask me anything about your data or wait for the morning summary. Commands — /help.

settings.title: ⚙️ Settings
settings.askSummaryTime: What time should I send your daily summary? Send an hour as HH:MM (e.g. 08:00).
settings.askTimezone: Send your timezone in IANA format (e.g. Europe/Lisbon).
settings.disconnected: Oura account disconnected and all your data deleted. You can reconnect any time with /connect.

summary.title: ☀️ Summary for {date}
summary.noData: No data for today yet. Your ring may not have synced, or Oura Membership may be required.

assistant.notConnected: Connect your Oura account first with /connect — then I can answer from your data.
assistant.quotaReached: You've hit today's question limit. Try again tomorrow — that keeps the shared free tier working for everyone 🙏
assistant.rateLimited: It's busy right now, please try again in a couple of minutes.
assistant.error: Couldn't process that. Please try again a bit later.
assistant.generalPrompt: That's a general question — it isn't based on your Oura data. Answer it as general advice?
assistant.generalTag: ℹ️ General information, not based on your data.
assistant.generalDisabled: That's a general health question, not about your specific numbers. Enable general-questions mode in /settings if you'd like those answers.

help.text:
*O Tracker commands*

/today — today's summary
/week — weekly overview
/connect — connect/reconnect Oura
/settings — language, timezone, summary time
/language — change language
/help — this help

Just type a question — I'll answer from your data.
help.medical: I don't diagnose. For medical questions, please see a professional.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
